steps.label: Basic Info
steps.helperText: Verify legal ownership and basic history before physical inspection.

questions.label: VIN/chassis matches registration
questions.helperText: Compare VIN plate, windshield VIN, and registration book.

questions.label: Current odometer reading (km)
questions.helperText: Enter dashboard reading.

questions.label: Odometer appears consistent with wear
questions.helperText: Check pedal/steering wear and service records.

questions.label: Service records available
questions.helperText: Stamped booklet or verified invoices.

questions.label: Registration number recorded
questions.helperText: Record exactly as printed on RC and number plate.

questions.label: Owner count on RC
questions.helperText: Higher ownership count may affect resale confidence.

questions.label: Typical previous usage
questions.helperText: Commercial/taxi usage can increase wear on drivetrain.

questions.label: Capture VIN/chassis plate photo
questions.helperText: Take a readable photo for record and verification.

steps.label: Exterior
steps.helperText: Inspect paint, structure, glass, lights, and tyre condition.

questions.label: Panel alignment and gap consistency
questions.helperText: Uneven gaps can indicate repaired collision damage.

questions.label: Paint shade matches across panels
questions.helperText: Check in natural light for repaint mismatch.

questions.label: No visible rust on body/arches
questions.helperText: Focus on wheel arches, rocker panels, and boot floor.

questions.label: Front aprons and strut towers
questions.helperText: Check for accidental repair signs: uneven welds, ripples, or messy sealant.

questions.label: Paint overspray and texture check
questions.helperText: Check rubber beadings and panel edges for rough paint or color mismatch.

questions.label: Windshield and window glass condition
questions.helperText: Look for chips, long cracks, and visibility distortion.

questions.label: Tyre wear is even
questions.helperText: Uneven wear suggests alignment/suspension issues.

questions.label: Tyre age condition
questions.helperText: Pick best match to sidewall date and cracking.

questions.label: All exterior lights functioning
questions.helperText: Check headlights, tail lamps, indicators, reverse lamps.

questions.label: Capture full exterior photo set
questions.helperText: At least one clear photo each: front, rear, left, right.

steps.label: Interior
steps.helperText: Assess cabin functionality, AC, warning lamps, and safety equipment.

questions.label: Seat and trim condition
questions.helperText: Look for tears, sagging foam, and water stains.

questions.label: Cabin smell check
questions.helperText: Damp/mould smell may indicate leakage or flood history.

questions.label: AC cooling performance
questions.helperText: Observe cooling speed and vent consistency.

questions.label: No persistent warning lights
questions.helperText: Engine/ABS/Airbag lights must not stay on after ignition.

questions.label: Windows, central lock, mirrors and horn working
questions.helperText: Check each electrical control once before road test.

steps.label: Test Drive
steps.helperText: Test real drivability: clutch, braking, steering, and vibrations.

questions.label: Engine starts and idles smoothly
questions.helperText: No rough idle, smoke burst, or long crank.

questions.label: Cold start quality
questions.helperText: Long cranking or rough start can indicate injector/glow issues.

questions.label: Clutch engagement is healthy
questions.helperText: Check bite point, slip under acceleration, and pedal effort.

questions.label: Braking is stable and confident
questions.helperText: No pulling, pulsation, or grinding sounds.

questions.label: No steering vibration at 60-80 km/h
questions.helperText: Vibration at this range may indicate balancing, alignment, or hub issues.

questions.label: Test drive observations
questions.helperText: Add notes about noise, pull, vibration, or smoke.

steps.label: Engine
steps.helperText: Advanced checks for fluid leaks, smoke behavior, and mount condition.

questions.label: No major oil leak signs
questions.helperText: Inspect sump area, valve cover, and underside.

questions.label: Coolant color and level are acceptable
questions.helperText: Avoid rusty or sludgy coolant signs.

questions.label: Capture clear engine bay photo
questions.helperText: Take one wide photo including turbo side and hoses.

questions.label: Engine blow-by / oil cap test
questions.helperText: Loosen oil cap while idling. Significant smoke or cap jumping indicates engine wear.

questions.label: Battery health and age
questions.helperText: Old/weak battery can hide start issues and add immediate cost.

questions.label: OBD/ECU diagnostic trouble codes
questions.helperText: Scan with OBD tool if available.

steps.label: Final Report
steps.helperText: Review risk level, insights, and negotiation recommendation.
